events.description: Transition from employment to retirement with recurring transfers from 401K and ROTH IRA to cash, including taxable income tracking.

events.description: Purchase a home with mortgage terms.
events.disclaimer: This event estimates the financial impact of purchasing a home based on key inputs including purchase price, down payment, mortgage term, interest rate, appreciation rate, and property tax rate. It generates a monthly payment and amortization schedule using standard fixed-rate mortgage formulas. The calculation does not account for additional homeownership costs such as HOA fees, maintenance, insurance, closing costs, or utilities.

event_functions_parts.title: Down Payment
event_functions_parts.description: Money being taken out of account to place a downpayment on the home

event_functions_parts.description: A debt account simulating the morgage loan with APR rate specified into an amoratization schedule

event_functions_parts.title: Final Home Payment Correction
event_functions_parts.description: A small correction on the final payment due to amoratization schedule inaccuracies

Account where the home mortgage debt is tracked.
Annual tax as a percentage of home value.
When the mortgage will be paid off (calculated automatically).
